name: insurance brokers managing 10-20 policy renewals/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 policy renewals/month, missed renewals cause coverage gaps. We monitor renewals instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Missed policy renewals can lead to coverage gaps for clients.
